sls_count_policy: SLS count intent must use a bounded query with '| select count(1) as cnt'; never infer real counts from --limit or normal search response total
sls_pagination_policy: SLS normal-log retrieval uses --page with --limit<=100; count first, then iterate pages. Backend can auto-segment bounded normal-log and single-row count(1) queries up to 24h, so clients must not emulate time slicing.

metric_evidence_policy.alert_quick: exactly one targeted metric selected from alert content
metric_evidence_policy.confirmation_rule: confirmed root cause requires at least two evidence classes; otherwise report suspected
